transcript: Speaker A: Hello Sir, Would you like to have tea or coffee? Speaker B: Uh... I want coffee only. Speaker A: તમે એમ કહી શકો, I would like coffee. [You can say, I would like coffee.] Speaker B: હા English થોડી weak છે. [Yes, English is a bit weak.] Speaker A: That's okay. તમે MySivi try કર્યું છે? [That's okay. Have you tried MySivi?] Speaker B: MySivi? Speaker A: હા. અહીં તમે AI teacher સાથે live English બોલીને practice કરી શકો છો. અને જો ભૂલ કરશો તો instant feedback પણ મળે છે. [Yes. Here you can practice by speaking live English with an AI teacher. And if you make a mistake, you also get instant feedback.] Speaker B: Ordering, interviews, daily conversations... બધું જ? [Ordering, interviews, daily conversations... everything?] Speaker A: Exactly. અને કોઈ judge પણ નથી કરતું. [Exactly. And no one judges you either.] Speaker B: પણ AI teachers મોંઘા પડતા હશે ને? [But AI teachers must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: બિલકુલ નહીં. Trial ફક્ત 1 રૂપિયાથી શરૂ થાય છે. Normal English classes કરતા 7 ગણું સસ્તું છે. 1 crore+ લોકો અત્યારે MySivi પર practice કરી રહ્યા છે. [Not at all. Trial starts from just 1 rupee. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. 1 crore+ people are practicing on MySivi right now.] Speaker B: પણ Time પણ નથી મળતો. [But I don't even get time.] Speaker A: રોજ ફક્ત 15-20 minutes કાફી છે. [Just 15-20 minutes daily is enough.] Speaker B: સરસ... કેવી રીતે શરૂ કરું? [Great... how do I start?] Speaker A: બસ Install button દબાવો. MySivi app install કરો, sign up કરો અને practice start કરો. 15 દિવસમાં improvement દેખાવા લાગશે. ચાલો, શરૂ થઈ જાઓ! [Just press the Install button. Install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in 15 days. Come on, get started!]
on_screen_text:
Hello Sir, Would you like to have tea or coffee?

તમે એમ કહી શકો, I would like coffee. [You can say, I would like coffee.]
હા English થોડી weak છે. [Yes, English is a bit weak.]
That's okay. તમે MySivi try કર્યું છે? [That's okay. Have you tried MySivi?]

Normal English classes કરતા 7 ગણું સસ્તું છે [It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes]
1 crore+ લોકો અત્યારે MySivi પર practice કરી રહ્યા છે. [1 crore+ people are practicing on MySivi right now.]
પણ Time પણ નથી મળતો [But I don't even get time]
રોજ ફક્ત 15-20 minutes કાફી છે [Just 15-20 minutes daily is enough]
સરસ... કેવી રીતે શરૂ કરું? [Great... how do I start?]
બસ Install button દબાવી [Just press the Install button]
MySivi app install કરો, sign up કરો અને practice start કરો [Install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing]

summary: An animated skit where a waitress gently corrects a customer's English and recommends the MySivi app. She explains that the app offers live practice with AI teachers, instant feedback, and affordable trials starting at 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app and start practicing.
